theme: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Industrial/Control Room Variant with Tech Accents)

global_rules.design_pattern: Industrial Asset Tracker modernizado con toques tech/futuristas
global_rules.glassmorphism: Subtle tactile glassmorphism for cards. High opacity + blur + 1px border.

layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

components.cards: Subtle glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl, 1px subtle inner border, max-rounded (8px).
components.tables: Sticky headers, right-aligned numbers, zebra striping on light mode, compact row height.
components.buttons: Flat colors, no heavy gradients. Primary action uses #8CB32A.
components.charts: Recharts. Interactive Tooltips, hover effects, dark-mode compliant grid lines (opacity 0.1).

interactions_and_animations.hover_states: Cards lift -translate-y-1 with expanded shadow. Button brightness increases.
interactions_and_animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion: fade in and slide up (y: 10, opacity: 0).
interactions_and_animations.data_viz: Recharts default animations enabled. Tooltips must show detailed split.
interactions_and_animations.micro_interactions: Status indicators (semáforo) should have a soft pulse animation (ping) for 'Crítico'.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark tech futuristic background for industrial asset tracker, subtle glowing green and teal accents
Modern public transit bus depot background alternative

instructions_to_main_agent: CREATE FILES WITH .js EXTENSION ONLY, NOT .tsx
Ensure global dark/light toggle is implemented at the root layout level using standard Tailwind 'dark' class.
Inject the custom brand colors (#8CB32A, #009890, #281C19) into tailwind.config.js theme extension.
All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, dropdowns) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute formatted as kebab-case.
Use Recharts for the interactive donut and area charts, ensuring they reflect the JIT semáforo colors.
The UI should feel dense but readable (Control Room Archetype). Use precise paddings (p-4 or p-6 in cards).
For cards, implement a subtle glassmorphism: in dark mode 'bg-[#281C19]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10'.
Maintain all requested pages: Dashboard, Inventory, Purchase Orders, Monthly Consumption, Sync, Chatbot, Billing.
